zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Comyn於大約1218年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，她的父親William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan56歲，母親Countess Margaret Buchan35歲。她於1236年之前與John de Keith Marischal of Scotland在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1274年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾比享年57歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Comyn于大约1218年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，她的父亲William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan56岁，母亲Countess Margaret Buchan35岁。她于1236年之前与John de Keith Marischal of Scotland在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1274年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾比享年57岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾比。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Comyn was born about 1218, in Elginshire, Scotland, her father, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, was 56 and her mother, Countess Margaret Buchan, was 35. She married John de Keith Marischal of Scotland before 1236, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1274, in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Comyn est née environ 1218, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Countess Margaret Buchan, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John de Keith Marischal of Scotland avant 1236, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1274, à Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Comyn um 1218 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan 56 und ihre Mutter Countess Margaret Buchan 35. Sie hat vor 1236 in Scotland John de Keith Marischal of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1274 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Comynが約1218年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchanは56歳，母Countess Margaret Buchanは35歳であった。1236年以前にスコットランドでJohn de Keith Marischal of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1274年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハンビで57歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハンビにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Comyn(이)가 대략 1218년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Margaret Buchan(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1236년 이전 스컷랜드에서 John de Keith Marischal of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1274년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 훔비에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 훔비에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Comyn родилась около 1218 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Margaret Buchan, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Keith Marischal of Scotland перед 1236 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1274 г. в местности хумби, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности хумби, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.
